name: Butterscotch Fudge Supreme
recipeInstructions: MAKES 2 1/2 POUNDS: COMBINE SUGARS, MILK AND MARGARINE IN A HEAVY SAUCEPAN. BRING TO FULL ROLLING BOIL, STIRRING CONSTANTLY. CONTINUE BOILING UNTIL THE THERMOMETER REACHES 234 DEGREES, STIRRING CONSTANTLY TO PREVENT SCORCHING. ADD MARSHMALLOWS CREAM, STIR UNTIL WELL COMBINED. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND STIR IN BUTTERSCTC PIECES UNTIL MELTED. ADD NUTS AND BEAT UNTIL WELL COMBINED. POUR INTO A GREASED 8 OR 9-INCH SQUARE PAN. COOL AT ROOM TEMPERATURE AND CUT INTO SQUARES.
